description: Style NoteGive your off duty wardrobe an earthy spin with this printed kurta from aurelia. Its pure cotton composition guarantees round the clock comfort. Team it with dark red leggings and kohlapuris for a weekend getaway.Product DetailsOff-white kurta with all over printin red, round neck, printed patch at neck and sleeve hem, cap sleeve, placket in front with coconut buttons, vented hem with turquoise printMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shade inside outHot iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5’8”, chest 33” and waist 28”) is wearing a size M
